name: redfoxes-baseball
description: Red Foxes vs Feixue Baseball Match Review - Youth baseball tactical analysis

scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:indexer && npm run test:ci:search:trigger && npm run test:ci:search:modal && npm run test:ci:pages && npm run test:ci:video:structure && npm run test:ci:video:autopause
scripts.test:ci:search: npm run test:ci:search:trigger && npm run test:ci:search:modal
scripts.test:ci:search:trigger: jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand test/search.test.js -t "Search Trigger on All Pages|Search Trigger Placement"
scripts.test:ci:search:modal: jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand test/search.test.js -t "Modal Open / Close|Search Result Rendering|Keyboard Shortcut Safety|Spinner Behavior|Search Input Styling|Keyboard Navigation in Results"
scripts.test:ci:video: npm run test:ci:video:structure && npm run test:ci:video:autopause
scripts.test:ci:video:structure: jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand test/video_autopause.test.js -t "should have 7 video containers with data-src attributes|should detect video visibility with IntersectionObserver"
scripts.test:ci:video:autopause: jest --passWithNoTests --runInBand test/video_autopause.test.js -t "should remove iframe when scrolled out of viewport and restore when back|should maintain video src after scroll"

author: ben1009
